title: Happy_Rat totem
description: Happy_Rat totem with sound is a simple resource pack that replaces the texture of the totem and its sound with the meme with Happy_Rat
body:
Happy_Rat totem with sound is a simple resource pack that replaces the texture of the totem and its sound with the meme with Happy_Rat!

This resource pack was made for the players of the GribMine server! Join us
